abilities.description: Look at the top three cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

triggers.description: At the beginning of each upkeep, if no spells were cast last turn, transform CARDNAME.

statics.description: Creature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

triggers.description: At the beginning of each upkeep, if a player cast two or more spells last turn, transform CARDNAME.
